chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-347 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.1587/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 06-5-2025 Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General and Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional Prosecutor General along with Investigation Officer SIP Taj Muhammad Kumbhar and Ghulam Asghar (respondent No.4).-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement and objections along with certain documents, have been filed by respondent No.4, which are taken on record. SIP Tan Muhammad, the Investigation Officer of Crime No.30/2025 registered with P.S Market, District Larkana has submitted his statement along with certain documents, which is also taken on record. The Investigation Officer of FIR bearing Crime No.30/2025 of Police Station Market, District Larkana is present and on direction of this Court has recorded statement u/s 161 Cr.P.C of the petitioner No.1 namely Mst. Benazir alias Sonia wherein she denied the allegation of such FIR and supported the contentions made in the instant petition. I.O submitted such statement of Mst. Benazir alias Sonia, which is taken on record. I.O further submits that after the statement of petitioner Mst. Benazir alias Sonia, he will file report by cancelling the case under “C” class. Such exercise shall be completed by the I.O within 15 days. After the statement of the I.O, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition and prayed that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners.

Such exercise shall be completed by the I.O within 15 days. After the statement of the I.O, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition and prayed that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners. The petition is disposed of along with pending application, with direction to the I.O to file report under “C” class as suggested by him within 15 days. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when they require. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
